title: Tala Food Piping Bag Set with 3 Nozzles, Perfect for Piping All Foods, Perfect for Mash Potato, Cream and Icing, Piping Bag is Reusable and Nozzles are Food Grade Stainess Steel
features: REUASBLE PIPING BAG: This Tala Icing Set offers the full solution for your Piping needs and comes with a reuasebale Icing Bag
NOZZLES: With three large Food Grade Stainless Steel Nozzles this will be great for piping in various styles and adding finishing touches
BPA FREE: The piping bag is made from high quaility BPA free plastic and had been desgined for constant even piping
FOR ALL: Perfect for the beginner, professional and perfectionist

TALA: The Tala collection of Kitchen gadgets and utensils includes a diverse which is perfect for everyday cooking and baking, established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality Kitchenware, Bakeware and Cookware
description: Product Description This Tala food decorating set is a essential for piping any foods in the kitchen, The three stainless steel nozzles allow for decorating in various styles and are perfect for piping mashed potato, meringues and adding final touches to cupcakes. Tala is one of Britain's oldest and best loved kitchenware brands, trusted by cooks all over the world since 1899. We have a rich history of manufacturing kitchen, home and utility wares. To buy Tala is to buy something underscored by generations of trust. It is a brand that has developed to meet the needs and wants of all homes to give the best quality in every product. Box Contains Food piping set
